parityMeta.describes: CC-0 coachAction-foundation — FUNCTION-LEVEL parity for sortDataHealthIssues (src/engines/dataHealthEngine.ts:41). The REAL sort is a STABLE copy-sort: primary severity DESC via dataHealthSeverityRank (error 3 > warning 2 > info 1), tie-break left.title.localeCompare(right.title, 'zh-CN') ASC. Cases pin every comparator branch — severity-beats-title (anti-aligned titles), same-severity ASCII title tie-break, same-severity zh-CN PINYIN tie-break (titles whose pinyin order DIFFERS from code-point order, so the golden proves localeCompare collation rather than ordinal compare), JS-stable equal-key preservation, empty + single-element edges, and a full mixed case carrying every DataHealthIssue field across all three severities + all eight category values. Generated from the REAL sortDataHealthIssues; the Swift DataHealthEngine.sortDataHealthIssues re-runs the SAME comparator over each echoed `issues` and COMPUTE-ASSERTs the order == golden `result`, case-by-case.
parityMeta.sourceNotes: No clock — pure stable comparator over an array copy (the ONLY observable output is issue order). Synthetic ids / ASCII + Chinese titles / synthetic messages; no email/token/userId. The zh-CN pinyin tie-break case uses 单(dan)/历(li)/模(mo)/智(zhi): pinyin order 单<历<模<智 INVERTS the code-point order 单<历<智<模 for 模/智, so this case fails an ordinal compare and only passes under the localeCompare('zh-CN') collation.

cases.label: severity DESC beats title ASC — anti-aligned titles (error has the title that would sort LAST, info the title that would sort FIRST); severity must override
same-severity ASCII title tie-break (all warning) — scrambled Cherry/Apple/Banana sorts Apple<Banana<Cherry
same-severity zh-CN PINYIN title tie-break (all error) — scrambled 智/单/模/历 sorts by pinyin 单(dan)<历(li)<模(mo)<智(zhi), which DIFFERS from code-point order
JS-stable equal-key preservation — an error floats above two warnings whose severity AND title are IDENTICAL (comparator==0); the two warnings keep input order (first before second)
full mixed — every DataHealthIssue field, all three severities, all eight category values, same-severity Chinese title tie-breaks; expect 错误A,错误B,警告A,警告B,信息A,信息B
